title: Corrective fix for B0028: Review and Sign Off Claims Plain Output Change
description:
Blocked reason: Out-of-scope CLI parser validation changes were bundled with the claims plain-output work, so the bead cannot be signed off as-is.

Remaining work: Remove the unrelated parser restrictions added in `src/codex_orchestrator/cli.py` for `create_parser.add_argument('--agent', ..., choices=runnable_agents)` and `handoff_parser.add_argument('--to', ..., choices=runnable_agents)`, and drop the corresponding out-of-scope tests at `tests/test_orchestrator.py:801` and `tests/test_orchestrator.py:815`. After that, rerun the targeted claims tests and re-review.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B0028.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Updated `src/codex_orchestrator/cli.py` so `bead create --agent` and `handoff --to` no longer enforce `choices=` validation, and removed the two out-of-scope parser rejection tests from `tests/test_orchestrator.py`. Validated the remaining claims plain-output coverage with targeted unittest cases.
handoff_summary.remaining: Retry the parent B0028 review/signoff against this narrowed diff. If desired, rerun the broader targeted review for the claims plain-output change only.
handoff_summary.risks: Linked doc `specs/simple-claims-plain-command.md` was not present in this worktree, so no spec file cross-check was possible. Downstream reviewers should continue to exclude unrelated branch changes, especially `src/codex_orchestrator/skills.py`, from the corrective scope.
handoff_summary.next_action: Re-review B0028 now that the unrelated parser validation changes and tests have been removed.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: This feature tree still contains unrelated branch work outside this bead, including `src/codex_orchestrator/skills.py`. Downstream agents should avoid folding those edits into the B0028 corrective review.

conflict_risks: This feature tree still contains unrelated branch work outside this bead, including `src/codex_orchestrator/skills.py`. Downstream agents should avoid folding those edits into the B0028 corrective review.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Run targeted validation needed to confirm the implementation.

Disallowed actions:
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
